name: Chicken with Anchovy Olive Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Pine Nuts, Or Pignoli Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, place the chicken, bay leaves and rosemary. Cover with water. Bring the water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes. The chicken will be almost cooked.
2. For the anchovy olive sauce:
a. In a blender, place the jalapeno peppers, black olives, anchovies, capers, onion, garlic, basil and nuts. Blend on medium speed until smooth.
b. Heat two tablespoons of oil in a heavy 10-inch skillet; pour in the anchovy olive sauce and chicken stock. Simmer for five minutes. Set aside.
3. Remove the chicken from the soup pot and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Heat two tablespoons of oil in a 12-inch skillet. Brown the chicken on all sides, draining all fat.
5. Pour in the anchovy sauce. Cook for ten minutes.
6. Serve on a heated plate.
